channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: WestJet and Fiji Airways announce partnership to simplify travel between Canada and the South Pacific
item.description: WestJet has entered into a new codeshare agreement with Fiji Airways, creating more seamless travel options for passengers between Canada, Fiji, and other destinations in the South Pacific. Under this...

item.title: Early Sickle Cell Diagnosis Crucial for Better Health Outcomes in Tanzania
item.description: People living with Sickle Cell Disease (SCD) in Tanzania have been urged to go for regular check-ups and treatment to prevent complications and improve life expectancy. Dr Emmanuela Ambrose from Bugan...

item.title: Arvind Kejriwal calls for student protests after NEET-UG 2026 exam cancellation due to paper leak
item.description: AAP national convener Arvind Kejriwal strongly criticised the Central government on May 12, 2026, over the leakage of NEET-UG 2026 question paper. He asked students to come out on the streets and prot...

item.title: FDA Commissioner Dr. Marty Makary Steps Down Amid Dispute Over Flavored Vapes
item.description: Dr. Marty Makary, the Commissioner of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA), resigned from his position on May 12, 2026, after ongoing disagreements with President Donald Trump. The conflict lar...

item.title: A Look Back at Jackie Magazine Covers and 1970s Teen Fashion
item.description: Jackie magazine was one of the most influential British teen publications of the 20th century, launched on January 11, 1964, by D.C. Thomson & Co. It gained immense popularity during the 1970s, becomi...

item.title: Tourism CS Miano Misses Critical Budget Meeting, MPs Raise Concerns
item.description: Members of Parliament in Kenya expressed strong disapproval of Tourism Cabinet Secretary Rebecca Miano after she missed the National Assembly Committee meeting to discuss the Ministry's 2026/27 budget...

item.title: Ramaphosa to challenge Phala Phala panel report in court, refuses to resign
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has confirmed that he will seek a judicial review of the independent panel’s report on the Phala Phala scandal and has firmly stated that he will not step down from his posit...

item.title: PCSO Announces No Winners for Major Lotto Draws on May 12, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) reported that there were no jackpot winners in the major lotto draws conducted on May 12, 2026. In the Lotto 6/42 draw, no player matched the winning c...

item.title: Michigan GOP Senate Candidate Faces Scrutiny Over Campaign Ties to Church With Convicted Leaders
item.description: Mike Rogers, a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate seat in Michigan, is under scrutiny for his campaign's association with Living Word Church, whose leadership has faced serious child sex abuse c...

item.title: Disney Adventure cruise cancelled in Singapore due to mechanical issues after passengers boarded
item.description: Disney's newest cruise ship, the Disney Adventure, experienced an unexpected mechanical issue that forced the cancellation of its voyage on May 7, 2026, in Singapore. Passengers had already been onboa...

item.title: Exploring Acceptance and Identity in Marathi Film ‘Baapya’
item.description: The Marathi film 'Baapya', directed by Sameer Tewari, explores the sensitive journey of gender transition, focusing on the life of Shailaja, who returns to her Konkan village as Shailesh after undergo...

item.title: Suparco Forecasts Eidul Azha on May 27, Pending Moon Sighting Confirmation
item.description: The Pakistan Space and Upper Atmosphere Research Commission (Suparco) has projected that Eidul Azha will most likely be observed on May 27, 2026. According to Suparco's statement, the new moon of Zilh...

item.title: AIADMK faction led by C.V. Shanmugam declares support for Vijay’s TVK in Tamil Nadu, paving way for new CM
item.description: The latest updates regarding the formation of the Tamil Nadu government could not be accessed due to server restrictions. According to the title and available information, a faction of the AIADMK part...

item.title: One Injured in Edmonton Jewellery Store Robbery; Suspects Remain at Large
item.description: On May 12, 2026, a violent smash-and-grab robbery occurred at a jewellery store in Edmonton. During the incident, one person was injured, and authorities are actively searching for the five suspects w...

item.title: Possible Impact of Senate Leadership Change on Sara Duterte’s Impeachment Trial
item.description: The recent shift in the leadership of the Philippine Senate has raised questions about whether it could influence the ongoing impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. Analysts note that chang...

item.title: Expert Reviews: The Best Pillows for Comfort and Support in 2026
item.description: Choosing the right pillow can significantly affect sleep quality, providing proper support and alignment for the head and neck. Sleep psychologist Stephanie Romiszewski highlights the importance of se...

item.title: Duran Duran Insist on Headliner Slot Before Performing at Glastonbury
item.description: Duran Duran, the iconic new wave and synthpop band with over 100 million records sold and accolades including Grammy and Brit Awards, have declared that they will not perform at Glastonbury unless off...

item.title: UK lift capacity limits may not reflect rising average body weights, raising safety concerns
item.description: Experts have raised concerns about lift safety across the UK, arguing that current capacity limits may no longer reflect the average weight of passengers. Research presented at the European Congress o...

item.title: Rising housing costs force young Australians to delay first home ownership
item.description: Young Australians are increasingly taking years to save enough for their first home, highlighting ongoing affordability challenges in the housing market. The article follows Kriti and Vivikth Narayana...

item.title: How Your Chronotype Can Influence the Benefits of Exercise
item.description: Research increasingly shows that the time of day we exercise can impact the health benefits we gain. This is largely influenced by an individual's chronotype – their natural preference for activity an...
